Summary:
The story is about an omega. That's you. You work at an ice cream parlor to escape the harsh realities of your world, where omegas are mistreated and can't afford suppressants to control their scent. Two alphas, Sonic and Shadow, are in a forbidden relationship and are frequent regulars at the parlor, trying to identify a sweet scent that draws them in. Unbeknownst to them, the scent is actually you.
